title: oldenlandia glabra
intro: Oldenlandia glabra, also known as smooth oldenlandia, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia glabra include reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of Oldenlandia glabra typically involve steeping the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
